caption: Sweet Trisha Needs a Loving Home! This precious girl was cruelly thrown from a bridge and hit by a car. She suffered serious injuries but never gave up! After multiple surgeries and lots of love, she's slowly improving. Her spirit is unbreakable! Trisha is now 9 months old and dreaming of a forever home.

Vera – The Brave & Beautiful Survivor! 8-month-old Vera was found abandoned, chased by a dog, and had to navigate the world all alone as a tiny kitten. She's a little cautious at first, but once she trusts you, she's the perfect mix of independent and affectionate.

Happily adopted! Meet Jarjeer – The Sweetest Gentle Soul! A 4-year-old lovebug who showed up as a shy kitten. With patience and kindness, he blossomed into a cuddle-loving, social cat who adores gentle affection, especially butt scratches!

Meet Houdini – a heart full of love! He first appeared as a tiny, hungry, shy kitten. In true Houdini fashion, he squeezed through a 4cm hole! Now he's a confident, talkative boy with his own unique language – special sounds for "no" and "yes"!

Meet Krivetka & Tartar – Two Rescue Kitties Looking for a Home! Krivetka got his name because he flops over like a little shrimp! Then one day, he showed up with a friend – Tartar, a loud, talkative orange cat. Krivetka would always escort Tartar to the food, making sure he felt safe.

Meet Archibald – The Giant Genius Cat! This big boy is not only massive in size but also in intelligence – he understands what you say! He's clever, cheeky, and playful. If you're looking for a unique, smart, and majestic cat, Archibald is your guy!
This fluffy cute boy is looking for new cat parents. 5 years old, in good health, potty trained. Perfect house cat.
Gorgeous Chewbacca! Looking for a family in Vienna and Lower Austria. Playful, cuddly and just super beautiful.
Platonida is a real star! She is something between a cat, a puppy, and a seal – an incredible and unbelievable magic creature.
Inseparable couple! Kitty Boys are waiting for their family in Vienna and outskirts.
